nasb.text: The sons of Bela were Ard and Naaman: of Ard, the family of the Ardites; of Naaman, the family of the Naamites.

esv.text: And the sons of Bela were Ard and Naaman: of Ard, the clan of the Ardites; of Naaman, the clan of the Naamites.

cnv.text: 比拉的眾子是亞勒、乃幔；屬亞勒的，有亞勒家族；屬乃幔的，有乃幔家族。

ccb.text: 比拉的子孙有亚勒族和乃幔族。
